SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Mercedes Gavin, Esq., for the Plaintiff YERBABUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC.
Mitchell Brown sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant RHIANNON CHERF.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 88 Perry Street, #546, San Francisco, CA 94107.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $934.89
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $300.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,234.89
Judgment signed in open court.
